series_metadata.series_title: Certificate of Compliance and Action Plan
series_metadata.series_description: To facilitate compliance with ORC 149.333, DAS issued Directive No. GS-D-04 requiring the agency to submit an annual Certificate of Compliance and Remedial action plan to the state records management office. This records series contains the Certificate of Compliance, Remedial action plan, and any supporting documents.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: from latest confirmation of receipt date from DAS. ; Electronic: from latest confirmation of receipt date from DAS
